name: Gingered Tofu Peanut Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the tofu and tamari into a smooth thick paste.
2. Transfer into a bowl. Vigorously beat in all remaining ingredients using a fork or blender.
3. Let stand 30 mins at room temperature before serving. This will keep for 3 to 5 days covered in the refrigerator.
Vegetarian Pleasures by Jeanne Lemlin.
